repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #88551 in place. The narrow source fix should let configured CLI-owned agent runtimes skip stale OpenClaw provider auth cooldowns in model fallback, while preserving the attempt-level guard that prevents auto-selected authProfileId forwarding into CLI transports unless the backend explicitly supports forwarding.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): skip auth gate for CLI-owned transport
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair and finalize #88551 in place.
- Let configured CLI-owned agent runtimes bypass stale provider auth cooldown checks before model fallback skips the candidate.
- Preserve the attempt-level behavior where CLI-owned transports keep provider context but do not receive an auto-filled authProfileId unless the CLI backend supports forwarding.

## Source and Credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88551 by @yu-xin-c.
- Related historical attempts: #85127 and #86568.
- Related merged plugin-harness fix: #89305.

## Repair Notes
- Re-fetch live #88551 and current main before editing.
- Rebase or refresh the maintainer-editable contributor branch if needed.
- Investigate the latest checks-node-core-tooling failure from the preflight artifact.
- Confirm ClawSweeper's stored-data-model note is only test serialized state, or add the required compatibility proof before merge.
- Run fresh Codex /review and address every actionable finding.

## Verification
- pnpm test src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/agents/model-fallback.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Preserve @yu-xin-c as the source PR author and primary contributor for #88551.
Keep prior related PRs #85127 by @TurboTheTurtle and #86568 by @zhangguiping-xydt in evidence/related context if the repaired PR body or squash message mentions the broader cluster.
Do not replace the branch unless a fresh re-fetch shows repair is no longer safe; maintainer_can_modify is true in the preflight artifact.
